scripts.install-all: concurrently "cd MovieBooking3x-main && npm install" "cd MovieBooking3x_Admin-main && npm install" "cd MovieBooking3x_Backend-main && npm install"
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd MovieBooking3x_Backend-main && npm run dev" "cd MovieBooking3x-main && npm run dev" "cd MovieBooking3x_Admin-main && npm run dev"
